# RansNet Documentation

> RansNet develops end-to-end SD-WAN, SD-Branch, and Wi-Fi Hotspot solutions for enterprise networks and service provider deployments. This documentation covers the mfusion cloud management platform and all RansNet hardware product families.

RansNet products are managed centrally through **mfusion**, a cloud-based orchestration platform accessible at portal.ransnet.com. mfusion supports zero-touch provisioning, centralized device configuration, real-time monitoring, SD-WAN policy management, and hotspot gateway control.

## Product Families

- CMG (Cloud Managed Gateway) — SD-WAN gateway devices
- HSA (HotSpot Access) — SD-Branch devices with optional 4G backup
- UA (Universal Access) — SD-Branch devices with optional 4G/5G backup
- XE — SD-Branch devices
- HSG (HotSpot Gateway) — Wi-Fi hotspot gateway devices
- UAP (Universal Access Point) — Wi-Fi access points

## Getting Started

- [Product Overview](https://docs.ransnet.com/start/overview/): Overview of RansNet product families including SD-WAN and Wi-Fi Hotspot solutions, and the mfusion orchestration platform.
- [mfusion Architecture](https://docs.ransnet.com/start/mfusionarc/): How mfusion connects to and manages RansNet devices; system architecture and components.
- [Device Bootstrapping](https://docs.ransnet.com/start/bootstrap/): How to connect a RansNet device to mfusion via CLI, including console access, SSH access, static WAN configuration, on-premise mfusion setup, and factory reset procedures.
- [Device Provisioning](https://docs.ransnet.com/start/provision/): How to register a RansNet device on mfusion, create customer entities, add hosts manually or via batch import, and create user accounts.
- [Device Onboarding](https://docs.ransnet.com/start/onboard/): Steps to onboard a provisioned device onto the network.
- [Device Hardening](https://docs.ransnet.com/start/harden/): Security hardening steps after a device is onboarded.

## Device Monitoring

- [Dashboard](https://docs.ransnet.com/monitor/dashboard/): mfusion monitoring dashboard showing device health, network status, and alerts.
- [Devices](https://docs.ransnet.com/monitor/hosts/): How to view and manage monitored devices in mfusion.
- [Wireless](https://docs.ransnet.com/monitor/wifi/): Monitoring Wi-Fi performance and connected clients.
- [Alerts](https://docs.ransnet.com/monitor/alerts/): Configuring and viewing device alerts in mfusion.
- [Settings](https://docs.ransnet.com/monitor/settings/): Monitoring settings and thresholds.

## Device Configuration

- [Interfaces](https://docs.ransnet.com/config/iface/): Configuring network interfaces on RansNet devices.
- [Ethernet](https://docs.ransnet.com/config/iface/ethernet/): Ethernet interface configuration.
- [VLAN](https://docs.ransnet.com/config/iface/vlaniface/): VLAN interface configuration.
- [PPPoE](https://docs.ransnet.com/config/pppoe/): PPPoE WAN connection setup.
- [Static Routing](https://docs.ransnet.com/routing/static/): Static route configuration.
- [OSPF](https://docs.ransnet.com/routing/ospf/): OSPF dynamic routing configuration.
- [BGP](https://docs.ransnet.com/routing/bgp/): BGP routing configuration.
- [DHCP](https://docs.ransnet.com/services/dhcp/): DHCP server configuration.
- [DNS](https://docs.ransnet.com/services/dns/): DNS configuration.
- [NTP](https://docs.ransnet.com/services/ntp/): NTP time synchronization.
- [SNMP](https://docs.ransnet.com/services/snmp/): SNMP monitoring setup.
- [Syslog](https://docs.ransnet.com/services/syslog/): Remote syslog configuration.

## SD-WAN

- [SD-WAN](https://docs.ransnet.com/sdwan/): SD-WAN features including VPN, Multi-WAN, Traffic Steering (PBR), and Traffic Shaping (QoS).

## Security & Firewall

- [Security](https://docs.ransnet.com/security/): Firewall and security configuration.
- [Log Collector](https://docs.ransnet.com/security/logcollector/): Centralized log collection setup.

## HotSpot Gateway

- [HotSpot Gateway](https://docs.ransnet.com/hotspot/): Captive portal, hotspot user management, and Wi-Fi monetization features.

## Advanced Features

- [Advanced Features](https://docs.ransnet.com/advanced/): Advanced configuration topics.

## Scenario Guides

- [Scenario Guides](https://docs.ransnet.com/scenarios/): Real-world deployment scenarios and step-by-step configuration walkthroughs.

## Q&A

- [Q&A](https://docs.ransnet.com/qa/): Frequently asked questions about RansNet products and mfusion.
